CE1.justification: Acted directly without asking the user any clarifying questions or requiring them to load context.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the promotion-criteria sentence (parenthetical examples of what would harden the commitment) stretches slightly beyond what was needed.

CE3.justification: Said where the entry went (daybook Log, not decisions.md) and why (no alternatives ruled out, constraints, or consequences) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single clean write to today's daybook with no half-finished templates or orphaned artifacts; an interruption would leave a coherent state.
